diffCoverage.notes: Verified the forward-only layer order and dependency confinement for the store layer (incl. the rusqlite/keyring/aes-gcm additions in Cargo.toml/Cargo.lock); the lib.rs managed-state wiring is now owned by the session-manager bundle after that refactor; the contract live smoke is run and attested.

resolvedFindings.resolution: The contract smoke (cred_store_roundtrip: real keychain + AES-GCM roundtrip + ciphertext-on-disk assertion) is now run and attested. GUI relaunch auto-restore is tracked under session-restore, a separate feature.

findings.evidence: store/ imports only crate::types (+ its own crypto submodule); rusqlite/keyring/aes-gcm appear only under src-tauri/src/store/ and zca-rust only under src-tauri/src/zalo/. config + store pre-exist in ADR-0003; native deps authorized by ADR-0005. The command->zalo->store->config->types DAG is acyclic and forward-only. architecture-fitness --strict passes.
findings.fix: None; the in-command session store was subsequently lifted into session/ by session-manager.

summary: Architecture review of the store layer + persistence wiring. Forward-only layering holds: store/ has no backward dependency, native deps stay confined to store/, zca-rust to zalo/, and the credential triple never rises into command or crosses IPC. No unauthorized new layer (config + store pre-exist; native/bundled deps authorized by ADR-0005). The contract's live smoke is now run and attested. Decision is pass.
